topStories.description: Pakistan's civilian and army leaders shuttle between key capitals as Trump says he may visit Islamabad to sign a deal.

topStories.title: US To Get All 'Nuclear Dust' From Iran Without Any Money Exchange, Says Trump
topStories.description: Trump says the US will retain all material generated by B-2 bomber strikes and claims Israel has been barred from carrying out further attacks in Lebanon.

topStories.title: Titanic Exhibit At US Museum Floods On Anniversary Of Sinking: 'Paranormal'
topStories.description: The Titanic exhibit at the Volo Museum, Chicago, flooded on the anniversary of the ship's sinking in the Atlantic Ocean.

topStories.title: With US spy laws set to expire, lawmakers are split over protecting Americans from warrantless surveillance
topStories.description: Some lawmakers are calling for widespread reforms following years of surveillance scandals and abuses across successive U.S. administrations. But even if the spy law known as Section 702 expires in April, the government's spy powers will not automatically lapse.

topStories.title: FAA to probe viral incident of pilots making animal noises on ATC frequency: 'Conversations must be related to….’
topStories.description: The FAA is investigating pilots who made animal noises on ATC frequency, emphasising that communication must focus on safe aircraft operation. The incident occurred at Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport, with pilots reprimanded for seemingly doing fun.

topStories.title: Trump warns naval blockade will continue despite Iran opening Hormuz Strait - 'Full force'
topStories.description: Hours after Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi on Friday announced that the Strait of Hormuz has been declared completely open, US President Donald Trump said the naval blockade will remain in place until the US-Iran transaction is 100 per cent completed.

topStories.title: ‘Had enough’: American woman quits Sweden after 8 years, cites work and visa challenges in viral post
topStories.description: An American entrepreneur has announced her decision to leave Sweden after nearly a decade, citing career challenges, immigration hurdles and growing concerns about how foreign professionals are treated.

topStories.title: The three clocks of the Iran war
topStories.description: Trump is racing against the midterms, Iran is betting on endurance, and Netanyahu needs a war with no end.

topStories.title: Macron and Starmer host allies for summit on Hormuz maritime security
topStories.description: US not part of France- and UK-led talks on a post-war Hormuz maritime force, but Europe's role remains limited.

dailyNews.description: Hours after Iran announced that the Strait of Hormuz is open for commercial vessels, US President Donald Trump on Friday (local time) said that the Islamic Republic has agreed to never close it again.

dailyNews.title: Battleground Dem says terrorists act from 'pain and frustration,' accuses Americans of being 'high and mighty'
dailyNews.description: Democratic Senate candidate Abdul El-Sayed says the U.S. should try to understand why terrorists commit "heinous acts," citing pain and frustration.

dailyNews.title: Minnesota prosecutor charges ICE agent in gun incident as Savanah Hernandez case remains uncharged
dailyNews.description: ICE agent faces felony charges in Minnesota for allegedly pointing a gun at two people, while no charges filed in attack on Savanah Hernandez.

dailyNews.title: 11th scientist death emerges in string of missing, dead officials with access to US secrets
dailyNews.description: Antigravity researcher Amy Eskridge, who reportedly died in 2022, draws renewed attention amid questions about scientists dying under odd circumstances.

dailyNews.title: Ravens star Zay Flowers says John Harbaugh made practice too hard: 'The load was heavy'
dailyNews.description: Baltimore Ravens star wide receiver Zay Flowers said John Harbaugh's practices caused injuries and said new head coach Jesse Minter plans a lighter workload.

dailyNews.title: ‘DWTS’ judge Carrie Ann Inaba rushed to hospital after mid-flight medical emergency
dailyNews.description: "Dancing With the Stars" judge Carrie Ann Inaba experienced a mid-flight medical scare that led to an ambulance ride and hospital visit after landing in New York.

dailyNews.title: LIV Golf CEO confirms Saudi funding will end but says he has a plan that 'might surprise some people'
dailyNews.description: LIV Golf CEO Scott O'Neil confirmed Saudi funding will end after this season but says he has a business plan that might surprise some people going forward.

dailyNews.title: Sheriff's office probing Nancy Guthrie vanishing faces intense backlash over social media post: 'tone deaf'
dailyNews.description: Pima County Sheriff's Department faces furious backlash over a post about a different Nancy that users called insensitive amid the Guthrie investigation.

dailyNews.title: Meet Analilia Mejia, the Sanders-AOC backed progressive who just won election to Congress
dailyNews.description: Analilia Mejia heads to Congress after a convincing special election win in New Jersey, running on Medicare for All, a $25 minimum wage and abolishing ICE.

dailyNews.title: Clarence Thomas praised after rare televised address warning of progressivism goes viral
dailyNews.description: Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas' rare speech warning progressivism threatens founding American values goes viral on social media platforms.

dailyNews.title: Senate temporarily extends nation’s controversial spying powers after House fumbles
dailyNews.description: The Senate voted unanimously to extend FISA surveillance powers after the House failed to reauthorize the program in the dead of night before its fast-approaching deadline.

dailyNews.title: Arizona State assistant strength coach and former Sun Devils player dead at 29
dailyNews.description: Former Arizona State football player and coaching assistant Steven Miller has died at 29. He started 35 games as an offensive lineman for ASU.

dailyNews.title: Latest news after Iran and Trump claim Strait of Hormuz is "completely open"
dailyNews.description: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and President Trump have declared that the Strait of Hormuz is "completely open." CBS News' Charlie D'Agata and Olivia Rinaldi report.

dailyNews.title: Trump to nominate Cameron Hamilton to run FEMA after he was ousted last year
dailyNews.description: Cameron Hamilton was acting leader of FEMA last year and was ousted after telling Congress that the agency should not be eliminated.

dailyNews.title: Iran announces the Strait of Hormuz is open
dailyNews.description: Iran announced that the Strait of Hormuz is completely open for commercial ships for the remainder of the ceasefire. President Donald Trump also confirmed the news. NBC News' Matt Bradley reports on what this could mean for the future as peace talks with Iran could continue.

dailyNews.title: Trump expected to nominate ousted FEMA chief to lead agency again
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump is expected to nominate Cameron Hamilton to serve as administrator of the Federal Emergency Management Agency, nearly a year after he was removed as its acting head.

dailyNews.title: Judge halts construction on Trump's White House ballroom
dailyNews.description: Judge halts construction on Trump's White House ballroom

dailyNews.title: White House holds press briefing
dailyNews.description: Watch live coverage as White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt holds a press briefing.

dailyNews.title: Iran declares Strait of Hormuz open to shipping; Trump says U.S. blockade still active
dailyNews.description: The Strait of Hormuz has remained almost completely closed as the U.S. and Iran have disputed the terms of their ceasefire agreement.

dailyNews.title: Anthropic's Dario Amodei to meet with White House about Mythos
U.S. tech companies ramp up government lobbying amid Iran war uncertainty
dailyNews.description: A White House spokesperson told CNBC the administration had been working with industry leaders to mitigate disruption brought about by the conflict.

dailyNews.title: Trump nominates Erica Schwartz as CDC director amid turmoil around leadership, vaccine policy
dailyNews.description: The CDC has been going through turmoil and several leadership shakeups under HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.

dailyNews.title: Tanker diplomacy: Trump faces tests from Havana to Hormuz
dailyNews.description: From Cuba to the Persian Gulf, Trump is expected to face fresh challenges across a new arc of tanker diplomacy.

dailyNews.title: Trump says gas prices 'not very high' as most U.S. voters blame him for price spike
dailyNews.description: Trump touted the rising stock market as he brushed off concerns that Americans are laboring under higher gas prices as a result of the Iran war.
